channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Harvey Weinstein's Third New York Sex Crimes Trial Ends in Mistrial
item.description: For the second time in a year, a jury failed to reach a verdict on a rape charge brought by Jessica Mann.

item.title: Shakira and Burna Boy Return to Official World Cup Song Duty
item.description: FIFA's official 2026 World Cup song is "Dai Dai" by Shakira and Burna Boy. Several factors influence which songs define a tournament.

item.title: Trump administration plans National Mall prayer event with mostly Christian speakers
item.description: The event follows a survey indicating many Americans are uneasy about mixing religion and politics.

item.title: Can the NFL's Rooney Rule endure amid DEI backlash?
item.description: Florida's attorney general argues the NFL's Rooney Rule, requiring minority candidate interviews for top roles, is discriminatory. Trump's ...
